title: Get clunger.service restart details for debrief

log.context: Get clunger.service restart details for debrief

Here is the full debrief on GitHub issue #49:

---

## What clunger.service does

clunger is the TypeScript/Bun web server at port 8081 — the `serve.py` replacement. It serves the clung.us site, handles GitHub OAuth, and hosts the Congress API (persona debate streaming via ConnectRPC/Protobuf). It calls LLMs (Claude SDK, Claude CLI, Grok/OpenAI) during congress sessions.
